nodes.name: Webhook

assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value:
={{ $json.body.action === 'rewrite-professional' ? 'Rewrite the following text in a polished, professional tone suitable for business communication. Preserve the meaning exactly. Output only the rewritten text, nothing else:

' + $json.body.text : $json.body.action === 'summarize-notes' ? 'Summarize the following notes into clear, concise bullet points. Focus on key takeaways and action items. Output only the bullet points:

' + $json.body.text : $json.body.action === 'meeting-followup' ? 'Write a professional meeting follow-up email based on these notes. Include: a brief summary, key decisions made, action items with owners (if mentioned), and next steps. Keep it concise:

' + $json.body.text : $json.body.action === 'clean-dictation' ? 'Clean up the following dictated speech: fix grammar, punctuation, capitalization, and remove filler words. Keep the meaning and voice intact. Output only the cleaned text:

' + $json.body.text : $json.body.action === 'draft-reply' ? 'Draft a professional, concise reply to the following message. Match the tone of the original. Output only the reply text:

' + $json.body.text : 'You are a CREAO agent app. Process the following text and return a helpful, well-formatted response:

' + $json.body.text }}

nodes.name: Build Prompt
nodes.notes:
Routes each CREAO action to the right system prompt.
Actions: rewrite-professional, summarize-notes, meeting-followup, clean-dictation, draft-reply, creao (generic).

TO INTEGRATE CREAO DIRECTLY:
  When creao_api_key is present, replace the AI node below with an HTTP Request
  node that calls your CREAO Agent App MCP endpoint:
    URL: https://app.creao.ai/mcp/<your-app-id>
    Method: POST
    Auth: Bearer {{ $json.creao_api_key }}
    Body: { "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": {{ $json.prompt }} }] }

nodes.name: AI — CREAO Agent
nodes.notes:
Fallback AI node — runs when CREAO_API_KEY is not set or CREAO MCP is not configured.
Replace with an HTTP Request node pointing to your CREAO Agent App MCP endpoint
once you have a CREAO account and agent apps set up.

_readme.title: AirKeys CREAO Workflow (Path B)
_readme.description: Routes CREAO slash commands from AirKeys through n8n to CREAO Agent Apps.
setup: 2. Activate the workflow and copy the webhook URL
4. Optionally set CREAO_API_KEY=<your-key> — it will be forwarded in the payload
5. To use CREAO directly: replace the 'AI — CREAO Agent' node with an HTTP Request node pointing to your CREAO Agent App MCP endpoint (see node notes)

slash_commands./rewrite-professional <text>: Rewrite text in a professional tone
slash_commands./draft-reply <text>: Draft a reply to a message

creao_integration.note: CREAO does not currently have a public REST API. Agent Apps are exposed as MCP servers.
creao_integration.mcp_path: GET your Agent App's MCP endpoint URL from app.creao.ai > Agent App > Settings > MCP
